cost. An example is the CCs for diabetes, where both the diabetes with acute complications and diabetes with chronic 
complications include diagnosis codes for ketoacidosis or coma. Note, a small number of diagnosis codes mapped into 
more than one CC. 

CMS imposes hierarchies among related CCs, so that the model codes a person for only the most severe manifestation
